{{Quote|My racing days are behind me.|Gandroff to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Gandroff''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a professional [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|racer]] from [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Go on, take a walk. My mood's sour enough without you here.|Gandroff to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
After racing for years, he retired and moved to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where he encountered the redeemed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who was looking for the [[Star Map]]. Gandroff offered advice to him about [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]], and [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] won the Tatooine Sector Championship by racing at [[Motta]]'s.

He knew [[Zoriis Bafka]] and [[Nico Senvi]] and admired their skills as racers, but was slightly worried about them being very young, as swoop racing was a cutthroat business.

==Behind the scenes==
The player has the option to (like with many others on Tatooine) insult Gandroff, or threaten him for credits. Doing so will result in a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]] shift.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
